creator: girgen@partitur.se
text:
Hi!

I used the work of jcwells@u.washington.edu (who ported
linux-communicator-4.5 a while back, but never got it committed) to
port the newly released version 4.51 of netscape communicator for
linux.

I runs very stable on my machine. Since people had trouble with the
earlier version 4.5 (I didn't; it has been running rock stable for a
couple of weeks here), please test this before comitting.
